response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the on-screen lyrics and spoken dialogue of Mizumiya Su. 2. JSON Usage: The basic reference was heavily expanded to manually transcribe the complete lyrics of her original song 'Umyu-Unya Happy Life' and her merchandise talk segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitle triggers are precisely anchored to vocal audio and truncated to avoid overlapping transitions.

subtitles.original: あーいい天気！
subtitles.english: Ah, such nice weather!

subtitles.original: あの雲、ソフトクリームみたい！
subtitles.english: That cloud looks like soft-serve ice cream!

subtitles.original: あ、あっちはわたがし！
subtitles.english: Ah, that one's cotton candy!

subtitles.original: 雲ってふわふわで美味しそう...
subtitles.english: Clouds look so fluffy and delicious...

subtitles.original: 人生で一回は食べてみたいよね～
subtitles.english: I want to try eating one at least once in my life~

subtitles.original: じゃない！
subtitles.english: Wait, no!

subtitles.original: しんどい しんどい マジしんどいわ
subtitles.english: Tired, tired, I'm seriously tired,

subtitles.original: 現実逃避 何度もしちゃうわ
subtitles.english: I end up escaping reality over and over again.

subtitles.original: 妄想 空想 頭が暴走
subtitles.english: Delusions, daydreams, my head is running wild.

subtitles.original: カツオ食べたーい！
subtitles.english: I want to eat bonito!

subtitles.original: だらだら ぐうたら 怠惰全開
subtitles.english: Slobbing around, idling, laziness fully open,

subtitles.original: ネガティブ思考もご愛嬌です保存
subtitles.english: even my negative thinking is part of my charm!

subtitles.original: 世界だってぽいぽいのぽいで
subtitles.english: Even the world is tossed aside like "poi-poi-poi"...

subtitles.original: えいやっ！えいやっ！どりゃっ！どりゃっ！ねじ伏せちゃうぞ☆
subtitles.english: Bam! Bam! Pow! Pow! I'll twist it into submission!☆

subtitles.original: うみゃ うみゃ うみゃ うみゃ お腹空いたら
subtitles.english: Umyu-umyu-umyu-umyu, when I'm hungry,

subtitles.original: 突撃！隣の晩御飯（ちょーらい！）
subtitles.english: raid! The next-door neighbor's dinner! (Give me some!)

subtitles.original: ぱくぱくうみゃうみゃしあわせタイム
subtitles.english: Munch-munch, umyu-umyu, happy time!

subtitles.original: 食欲で生きてます
subtitles.english: I live for my appetite!

subtitles.original: だからどうかお願い
subtitles.english: So please, I beg of you...

subtitles.original: このおなかを満たして 神様
subtitles.english: satisfy this stomach, O God!

subtitles.original: 食べたーい！寝たーい！
subtitles.english: I want to eat! I want to sleep!

subtitles.original: 難しいことは何も考えたくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to think about anything complicated!

subtitles.original: あとあと、みんなでお菓子パーティもしたーい！
subtitles.english: And also, I want to have a sweets party with everyone!

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃうみゃうみゃおいしくなーれ
subtitles.english: Umyu-umyu-umyu-umyu, become delicious!

subtitles.original: あれもこれも全部食べたいな
subtitles.english: I want to eat this, that, and everything!

subtitles.original: ぱくぱくうみゃうみゃハピネスライフ
subtitles.english: Munch-munch, umyu-umyu, happiness life!

subtitles.original: 食べて寝て遊んでまた食べ
subtitles.english: Eat, sleep, play, and eat again!

subtitles.original: ペコペコペコペコ腹ペコだ
subtitles.english: Hungry, hungry, hungry, hungry, my stomach is empty!

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃうみゃ美味しく召しませ
subtitles.english: Umyu-umyu-umyu, enjoy the deliciousness!

subtitles.original: ひとまずごはんをお腹いっぱい
subtitles.english: For now, let me eat my fill of food...

subtitles.original: 食べさせて
subtitles.english: Please feed me!

subtitles.original: まだ足りない
subtitles.english: It's still not enough!

subtitles.original: もっともっと食べさせて
subtitles.english: Let me eat more and more!

subtitles.original: 新曲どうだったー？可愛かったでしょう？
subtitles.english: How was the new song? Cute, right?
